coreValues.mainSubtitle: We are guided by principles that ensure authentic and memorable experiences.

personalization.title: Personalization
personalization.desc: We create unique itineraries, tailored to your wishes and needs.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.desc: We promote responsible travel that respects the environment and local communities.

ethicsIntegrity.title: Ethics and Integrity
ethicsIntegrity.desc: We operate with full transparency and honesty in all interactions.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We use technology and creativity to offer cutting-edge travel solutions.

clientFocus.title: Client Focus
clientFocus.desc: We put your needs at the center of everything we do, ensuring your satisfaction.

community.title: Community
community.desc: We support and involve local communities in the destinations we explore.

cta.title: Ready to design your trip?
cta.subtitle: Your next great adventure begins with a simple conversation. Leave the logistics to us and focus on the memories.

founder.bio1: With an unwavering passion for travel and a vision to create unique experiences, Luís Campos founded AKMLEVA. His leadership and dedication have shaped the company, transforming it into a beacon of excellence in the tourism sector. He believes that every trip is an opportunity to discover something new, both in the outside world and within ourselves.
founder.quote: Traveling is the only thing you buy that makes you richer.

hero.subtitle: Discover unique destinations with personalized and memorable experiences.

mapContact.title: Our office

partnerships.subtitle: We collaborate with the best to offer you the best.

gea.desc: Partnership with GEA Group, the largest network of independent travel agencies in Portugal, ensuring access to a wide range of services and exclusive conditions.

sanjotec.desc: Collaboration with the Science and Technology Park of São João da Madeira, promoting innovation and technological development in the tourism sector.

dgconsulting.desc: Specialized consulting in management and strategy, ensuring optimization of our processes and excellence in our services.

turismodeportugal.desc: Official partnership with Turismo de Portugal, ensuring access to national destinations and quality certification of our tourism services.

story.subtitle: Since our founding, we have been dedicated to turning dreams into reality.
story.paragraph1: AKMLEVA was born from a passion for exploring the world and the belief that every journey should be a transformative experience. Founded with the aim of going beyond conventional tourism, we seek to create itineraries that not only showcase destinations but also connect travelers with local culture and the essence of each place.
story.paragraph2: We believe that the true richness of a trip lies in the memories created, the people met, and the broadened perspectives. Therefore, every detail is carefully planned to exceed expectations, from the choice of accommodation to the most authentic activities.
story.missionStatement: To inspire and facilitate life-enriching travel, promoting discovery and respect for the diverse cultures of the world.

team.title: The Leadership of AKMLEVA
team.subtitle: Meet those who turn vision into reality and ensure excellence in every service delivered.

luis.name: Luís Campos
luis.bio: With extensive experience in the tourism sector, he leads AKMLEVA with the vision of turning every trip into a unique and personalized experience.
luis.fullBio: Luís Campos is the heart and mind behind AKMLEVA. With more than 15 years dedicated to the tourism and real estate industry, he has built a solid reputation based on trust and excellence. His entrepreneurial vision made it possible to create an agency that does not merely sell destinations, but designs memories. As CEO, Luís is directly involved in strategic planning and in guaranteeing service quality, always maintaining the closeness with clients that defines the AKMLEVA brand.
